description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named runtime-linux-x64-gcc that triggers on push and pull request events. Run a build-simulator job on an ubuntu-18.04 environment with a matrix strategy. The job should check out the repository, set up Python 3.7, install Conan, configure Conan, create a build environment, configure CMake with gcc-10 and g++-10, build the project, and install it.
